name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Long Beach, CA's Superb Cash Advance at 976 E 4th St offers fast payday and title loans with extended hours.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance is located at 976 E 4th St #1 in Long Beach, CA, operating as a standalone payday and title loan storefront. This Long Beach location serves customers Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, with weekend hours from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM on Saturdays and Sundays, providing convenient access for busy schedules.

At this Long Beach branch, you can access payday loans, title loans, and related financial services. Contact the location directly at (562) 548-8075 to discuss your borrowing options, loan terms, and eligibility requirements with experienced staff.

If you need quick cash in Long Beach, CA, this Superb Cash Advance location provides straightforward borrowing when unexpected expenses arise. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and bank account information when you visit. This location offers the direct service and fast processing typical of in-store payday loan services.
pros: No credit check required — all credit types explicitly accepted
Wide loan range: $250–$50,000 for bad credit loans; up to $1,000 for payday/cash advance
Minimal documentation required for same-day loan approval
Flexible repayment arrangements reported by customers
Walk-in storefront with direct staff contact — not a faceless online lead generator
cons: No APR, fee, or rate disclosure visible on the website — critical transparency gap
Multiple recent reviews reference an 'Arvada' (Colorado) location on the Atlanta page, raising authenticity concerns
Payday and cash advance loans capped at $1,000 — limited for larger emergency needs
No 24/7 access; closes at 8:30pm weekdays and 6:30pm weekends
High-cost lending model typical of storefront payday lenders — not suitable for non-emergency borrowing
best_for: Atlanta-area residents with bad or no credit who need $100–$1,000 same day
Borrowers who have been declined by banks and need in-person assistance
People who prefer a physical walk-in location over online-only lenders
Consumers who need cash outside standard banking hours on weekends
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance suits Atlanta residents with poor or no credit who need small amounts of cash fast and prefer an in-person lender. The main caveat is a complete lack of disclosed rates or fees—borrowers should ask for the full APR and all costs before signing, as payday-model lenders typically carry triple-digit annual rates.
services: Installment loans with flexible repayment schedules
Online cash advance application (up to $5,000 via web form)
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 976 E 4th St, Long Beach, CA. Fast payday and title loans with extended hours.
